final_answer:
Phase 5 is complete: scanner code and scanner paths now have zero `blockscout|block_scout|block-scout|block scout` matches (excluding `deps/_build/node_modules/.next`).

This matters because the scanner is now fully aligned to Gold Chain naming at content + path level, not a half-rebranded state.

Confirmed:
- Strict content scan count: `0`
- Strict path scan count: `0`
- Backend compile passed from `scan/goldscan` (`mix deps.get && mix compile` in Docker `elixir:1.19.4`)
- Frontend checks passed in `scan/goldscan-frontend`: `pnpm lint:tsc` and `pnpm build`
- Compose smoke passed: `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml config` (only the standard obsolete `version` warning)

Failure encountered and fixed:
- Root cause: automated rename changed `absinthe_plug` git URL to a non-fetchable repo (`https://github.com/goldscan/absinthe_plug.git`), which broke backend compile.
- Fix path: vendored `absinthe_plug` locally and switched deps to local path in [mix.exs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/goldscan/mix.exs) and [mix.exs](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/goldscan/apps/goldscan_web/mix.exs); also vendored frontend type packages and switched to `file:vendor/*` in [package.json](/srv/repos/gold-chain/scan/goldscan-frontend/package.json).

Next steps:
1. Commit Phase 5 changes (including new `vendor/` trees under `scan/goldscan` and `scan/goldscan-frontend`).
2. Add the strict zero-match scan as a CI gate so this cannot regress.
